title: UK Streetwear Brand — Sustainable Hoodie Line Launch
client: A mid-size UK streetwear brand (50+ employees)
challenge: The brand needed a manufacturing partner who could produce 2,000 organic cotton hoodies in 4 weeks for their autumn drop. Their previous Far East supplier quoted 8 weeks minimum with an MOQ of 5,000 — too slow and too many units for a limited-edition capsule. Quality consistency was also a concern after a bad batch ruined 15% of their last order.
solution: Bassi Clothing delivered: (1) MOQ of 300 per colorway, allowing a 5-color capsule collection; (2) GOTS-certified organic cotton fleece at 300 GSM; (3) Full production completed in 22 days from sample approval; (4) Dedicated QC at every stage with photo documentation; (5) Direct shipping to their UK warehouse via air freight.

results.cost_savings: 30% lower per-unit cost vs. previous supplier
results.delivery: 100% on-time delivery — 22 days from approval to UK warehouse
results.quality: Zero defects on final inspection (AQL 2.5 standard)
results.reorder: Brand placed repeat order for Spring/Summer 2026 within 3 weeks

testimonial: Bassi Clothing understood our vision from day one. The samples arrived in 5 days, production was flawless, and the pricing let us actually make margin on a sustainable line. We've never had this experience with any other manufacturer.

title: German E-commerce Brand — Private Label T-Shirt Range
client: A fast-growing German DTC fashion brand
challenge: The brand was scaling rapidly and needed a reliable manufacturing partner for their core product line of premium basics. Their key requirements: consistent quality across 10,000+ units per month, Oeko-Tex certification for the German market, and the ability to handle 15+ SKUs simultaneously.
solution: Bassi Clothing provided: (1) Dedicated production line for their monthly orders; (2) Oeko-Tex Standard 100 certified fabrics across all SKUs; (3) Custom color-matched Pantone shades for brand consistency; (4) Monthly production capacity of 12,000 units with surge capability to 18,000; (5) DAP shipping to their German fulfillment center.

results.cost_savings: 25% reduction in per-unit costs compared to European manufacturing

testimonial: The combination of quality, price, and reliability is exceptional. We've been able to launch new colorways every month without worrying about production bottlenecks.

title: Dutch Sustainable Fashion Startup — Complete Product Line
challenge: As a young brand with limited capital, they needed a manufacturer who could handle small initial orders (MOQ under 500) while maintaining premium sustainable standards. They required GOTS certification, traceable supply chain documentation, and eco-friendly packaging — all at a price point that allowed viable retail margins.
solution: Bassi Clothing offered: (1) Startup-friendly MOQ of 300 pieces per style; (2) Full GOTS certification with supply chain transparency reports; (3) Water-based inks and natural dyes for all printing; (4) Compostable poly bags and recycled cardboard packaging; (5) Flexible payment terms (50% advance, 50% on shipment).

results.delivery: All 3 initial styles delivered in 25 days
results.quality: Full GOTS audit passed on first attempt
results.reorder: Expanded to 8 styles within 4 months, 3x initial order volume

testimonial: Finding a manufacturer that takes sustainability as seriously as we do, at a price point that works for a startup — that's incredibly rare. Bassi Clothing is now our only manufacturing partner.
